- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
  Full stack workspace with Angular, Laravel, MySQL, and Docker Compose.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
  Angular 21 was generated in `frontend/` and Laravel 13 in `backend/`.

- [x] Customize the Project
  Added Docker Compose, Dockerfiles, Angular proxy, Laravel API health route, and a starter landing page.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
  No required extensions were identified for this workspace.

- [x] Compile the Project
  `docker compose config` and `docker compose up --build -d` completed successfully.

- [x] Create and Run Task
  Added and ran the VS Code task `docker-compose-up`.

- [ ] Launch the Project
  Debug launch is pending user confirmation.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
  README and workspace instructions are present and aligned with the current setup.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
